description: AI-powered property booking automation for homestays, villas, and guesthouses. Record bookings, expenses, and cancellations by sending a chat message. Dashboard updates automatically.

/.title: Chakrio — Manage Property Bookings by Message
/.description: Automate property bookings, cancellations and expenses with an AI chatbot. Chakrio records everything to your dashboard automatically. Free tools for property managers.

/tools/occupancy-calculator.title: Hotel Occupancy Rate Calculator — Free Tool | Chakrio
/tools/occupancy-calculator.description: Calculate your hotel or homestay occupancy rate for any period. Free online tool for property managers — no sign-up required.

/tools/rental-income-calculator.title: Rental Income Calculator for Property — Free Tool | Chakrio
/tools/rental-income-calculator.description: Estimate gross and net rental income from your property. Enter rooms, nightly rate, occupancy and expenses to see your profit. Free tool for property managers.

/tools/cancellation-policy.title: Hotel Cancellation Policy Generator — Free Template | Chakrio
/tools/cancellation-policy.description: Generate a professional hotel cancellation policy in seconds. Customise deposit %, refund windows, and no-show rules. Free template for property managers.

faq.q: I already use a spreadsheet — why do I need this?
faq.a: Spreadsheets work, but they require you to open them, find the right tab, and type every field manually — every single booking. With Chakrio, you just send a message in plain language and the record is created automatically. No switching apps, no formatting, no errors from fat-fingering a date.

faq.q: What if I have multiple properties?
faq.a: Chakrio supports multiple properties under one account. Each property has its own booking records and dashboard. You can switch between them instantly from the same login.

faq.q: What types of properties can use Chakrio?
faq.a: Chakrio is built for owner-operators running homestays, villas, guesthouses, and small hotels. It works for single-property owners as well as those managing two or more properties.

faq.q: Do I need technical knowledge to use Chakrio?
faq.a: None at all. If you can send a text message, you can use Chakrio. You simply type bookings in natural language — the AI handles the rest.
We onboard every property personally. WhatsApp us at +91 94618 88529 and we'll get your booking bot live — usually within 24 hours.

how_to.name: How to record a property booking with Chakrio
how_to.description: Record a booking in seconds by sending a plain-language message — no spreadsheets, no forms.

steps.name: Send a message
steps.text: Type a booking or expense in plain language to the chatbot — exactly how you would say it out loud. Example: 'Rajan, 3 nights from 5th April, Rs 4500 advance'.

steps.name: AI parses it
steps.text: Chakrio's AI extracts guest name, dates, amounts, and booking type — no structured input needed.

steps.name: Auto-recorded
steps.text: The data is recorded automatically and your dashboard updates in real time. Revenue, expenses, and reports stay current without any manual entry.
